title: Verify admin users table layout with Playwright
description: Create a Playwright test to verify the visibility and alignment of the admin users table. 1. Mock `/api/v1/users/admin` endpoint. 2. Verify all expected columns (User, Role, Status, Registration, Actions) are present on desktop. 3. Verify that on mobile view, the 'desktop-only' columns are hidden. 4. Check for basic visibility (is table row height > 0).
acceptance_criteria: Test passes for desktop and mobile viewports
Test checks for correct column visibility
